case_title: FOSTER, JOSEPH VS BUTTERFIELD, CLIFFORD MNGR. 19TH AVE AUTO BODY CTR et al

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDANCE FROM JOSEPH FOSTER TO COURT FILED.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM JOSEPH FOSTER, FILED. SENT TO PLFT SCF #35.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY FOSTER, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD, CLIFFORD MNGR. 19TH AVE AUTO BODY CTR MR. J.M. LEE, OWNER SUN JIN CORPORATION DBA 19TH AVE AUTO BODY CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD, CLIFFORD MNGR. 19TH AVE AUTO BODY CTR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOSTER, JOSEPH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUTTERFIELD, CLIFFORD MNGR. 19TH AVE AUTO BODY CTR MR. J.M. LEE, OWNER SUN JIN CORPORATION DBA 19TH AVE AUTO BODY CENTER CLIFFORD BUTTERFIELD AND J.M. LEE ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
